name: AIR T INC
business: Air T, Inc. is a holding company with five operating segments: Overnight air cargo, which provides air express delivery services under contract with FedEx; Ground support equipment, which manufactures mobile deicers and other specialized equipment for airlines, airports, and the military; Commercial aircraft, engines and parts, which trades, leases, and provides parts and services for aircraft engines and components; Digital solutions, which provides data aggregation and software services to the aviation industry; and Regional airline, which operates scheduled passenger and freight services in Australia under the Rex brand.

exposures.sentence: In October 2021, GGS was awarded a new contract to supply deicing trucks to the USAF.

MAC and CSA have had a relationship with FedEx spanning more than 40 years. They operate and maintain Cessna Caravan, SkyCourier, ATR-42 and ATR-72 aircraft that fly daily small-package cargo routes throughout the eastern United States.

Contrail is a commercial aircraft trading, leasing and parts solutions provider. Its primary focus revolves around the CFM International CFM56-3/-5/-7 engines and the International Aero Engines V2500A5 engine, which power the two most prevalent narrow body, single aisle aircraft that are currently flown commercially the Boeing 737 Classic / 737 NG and the Airbus A320 family.
WACD is a data aggregator that collects global air cargo shipping data. It partners with customers to collect and verify their data as part of a data partnership.

catalysts.sentence: The current dry-lease agreements are set to expire on August 31, 2026.
with all option years expected to be executed by the government, this contract would expire on October 21, 2027.

catalysts.event: Delivery of 14 deicers to USAF in Q2 FY2027
catalysts.sentence: GGS received confirmed orders of 14 deicers for fiscal year 2027 and currently expects delivery of both GL1800 and ER 2875 models in the second quarter of fiscal year 2027.

catalysts.event: Third NPA additional advance of $10 million
catalysts.sentence: Investors are obligated to advance to the Issuer an additional aggregate $60.0 million in $10.0 million increments, each on or within fifteen days of the following dates: ... May 30, 2026 $10.0 million
